I value hard work and believe it plays a significant role in achieving success, even if luck can play a part in certain opportunities.

header_21.raw_response: Based on my experiences, I often find myself working under pressure and completing tasks at the last minute due to inconsistent work hours, financial stress, and a lack of structure in my life. While I do try to plan ahead, like signing up for classes or volunteering, I often feel like I'm constantly reacting to what comes next rather than proactively managing my time. My life has been shaped by unpredictability, which makes me more aligned with the 'last-minute burst' end of the spectrum.
